display.purpose: Auth aside headlines and single hero moments per viewport.

headline.purpose: Section titles and study-set names in chrome.

body.purpose: Default reading text; cap at 65–75ch in prose.

label.purpose: Instrument metadata via font-label — uppercase Space Grotesk.

shadows.name: auth-panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Login and signup form card elevation only.

shadows.name: quiz-play-ambient
shadows.purpose: Scoped quiz-play stitch cards in light mode.

motion.name: ease-route-enter
motion.purpose: Route enter animation (380ms) — fade, slide-up, deblur.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; gap: 6px; font-family: var(--font-body), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: #ffffff; background: var(--primary, #5f0f00); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 4px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, transform 100ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary, #5f0f00) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring, #ff967d); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #ff967d) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; font-family: var(--font-body), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--foreground, #181c1b); background: var(--background, #f7faf8); border: 1px solid var(--border, #c0c9c3); border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 4px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted, #f1f4f2); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--ring, #ff967d); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #ff967d) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; font-family: var(--font-body), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--foreground, #181c1b); background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 4px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--muted, #f1f4f2); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #ff967d) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default field for search, auth, and forms.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: var(--font-body), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--foreground, #181c1b); background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--input, #f1f4f2); border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 4px); outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, #404945); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, #ff967d); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ring, #ff967d) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default content container — ring, no shadow.
components.html:
Cell Biology
24 questions · last studied yesterday
Ready to review.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--card-foreground, #181c1b); background: var(--card, #ffffff); border-radius: var(--radius-xl, 5.6px); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--foreground, #181c1b) 10%, transparent); } .ds-card-header { padding: 0 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-body), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.375; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted-foreground, #404945); } .ds-card-body { padding: 0 16px; }

components.name: Badge
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: var(--font-body), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #ffffff; background: var(--primary, #5f0f00); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Instrument metadata — dashboard filters, parse status.
components.css: .ds-section-label { font-family: var(--font-label), ui-monospace, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted-foreground, #404945); }

components.name: App Navigation
components.html: D2Doc2Quiz
components.css: .ds-topbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; background: var(--background, #f7faf8); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #c0c9c3); } .ds-topbar-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-topbar-mark { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; background: var(--primary, #5f0f00); border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 2.4px); } .ds-topbar-name { font-family: var(--font-body), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--d2q-blue, #376757); } .ds-topbar-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-topbar .ds-btn-ghost, .ds-topbar .ds-btn-primary { height: 32px; }

narrative.overview:
Doc2Quiz is a document-first study tool: users upload PDFs, the app structures the output into quizzes and flashcards, and the interface stays out of the way. The visual system reads like a precise ledger — mint-tinted paper, forest-green structure, oxblood authority for primary actions, coral for signals and focus rings. Nothing decorative for its own sake; every accent earns its place on a work surface.

Density is compact but breathable. The app shell uses a technical line grid on main to signal workbench without turning the UI into a blueprint poster. The system explicitly rejects generic SaaS landing-page aesthetics, purple-gradient dark mode, glassmorphism-as-decoration, oversized pill cards, and uppercase eyebrow kickers on every section.
keyCharacteristics: Mint-paper backgrounds with forest-sage structure and oxblood primary actions
Manrope for reading; Space Grotesk uppercase labels for instrument chrome
Tight 4px base radius — precise, not playful
Flat surfaces with 1px rings; shadows reserved for auth panels and elevated modals
Technical grids opt-in on work surfaces, never as full-page wallpaper
Light mode is the default design target; dark mode inverts to deep forest with coral signals

rules.name: The Coral-is-Signal Rule
rules.body: Coral (#ff967d) appears on focus rings, parse progress, and accent highlights — never as a page background or card fill. If coral covers more than ~10% of a screen, you've left the ledger.

rules.name: The Mint-Paper Rule
rules.body: Body backgrounds stay in the cool mint family (#f7faf8 light / #0c1a17 dark). Warm sand, cream, and parchment tones are prohibited in the app shell.

rules.name: The Label-is-Instrument Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels are for wayfinding and status — dashboard filters, parse progress, flashcard session chrome. Never stack a label eyebrow above every section heading; one deliberate label per functional cluster is enough.

rules.name: The Display Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Hero/display text maxes at ~2.25rem (36px). Doc2Quiz is a tool; it does not shout.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Rings and tonal steps carry structure; shadows are a response to elevation context (auth, modal, play session), not default decoration.

rules.name: The No-Ghost-Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair border: 1px solid with a soft wide drop shadow (blur ≥16px) on the same element. Pick one structural device.

dos: Do use d2q-technical-grid on app main and full-width work canvases for workbench context.
Do use font-label (Space Grotesk, 0.08em tracking, uppercase) for status, filters, and instrument metadata.
Do keep primary actions oxblood (#5f0f00) and focus rings coral (#ff967d).
Do use ring-1 (ring-foreground/10) on cards instead of drop shadows.
Do cap body text contrast: Muted Ink (#404945) on Mint Paper, never lighter grays for readable copy.
Do scope quiz-play stitch tokens to [data-quiz-play-theme="stitch"] — don't leak play-session colors into the library shell.
donts: Don't use warm cream, sand, beige, or parchment body backgrounds — the mint-paper cool tint is the brand surface.
Don't add uppercase eyebrow kickers above every section heading — that's AI landing-page grammar, not ledger wayfinding.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative grid backgrounds on marketing-style hero sections inside the app.
Don't exceed 4px base radius on structural containers — cards top out ~6px; pills are for badges/buttons only.
Don't pair 1px borders with wide soft shadows on the same card — pick ring OR shadow, not both.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left >1px colored accent) on cards, alerts, or list items.
Don't animate layout properties for route transitions — opacity, transform, and filter only (d2q-route-enter).
